# **Ethical Considerations**
***

There are some important ethical considerations when working with data relating to this case study's main questions.

1. These data come from human immune cells, so learners should treat donor metadata carefully even when the dataset is public and de-identified.
1. Public case-study repositories should not include protected health information or unnecessary sensitive metadata.
1. Reproducible workflows improve transparency, but they also make it important to document what data were processed, subset, or cached.
1. This case study is educational and should not be used for clinical decision-making.

The processed files in this draft project use donor or patient replicate labels only for analysis structure. We will not attempt to infer private donor attributes from these labels.

***
